rows.label: tev055301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Kopopo about the
provisional government.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Kopopo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Kopopo planning to go to provisional
government and cram Nopon demands down...
Uh, to lobby for Nopon-friendly laws![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Kopopo send messengers to
bigwigs every single night.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Bribe them? Mo! This not about money!
Nopon just want bigwigs to know who true
friends of bigwig actually are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0004
rows.name:
That why Kopopo send one Nopon per day to room of
each bigwig. Just like pillow-delivery service, but
fluffier. Oh, and if pillows never stopped talking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Soon all bigwigs will see
things through lens of Kopopo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Kopopo is very intent on forcing... Er,
CONVINCING bigwigs to listen to Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0009
rows.name:
But Kopopo not forget to speak up for
Sun'barac and others. Kopopo is true man
of people. Fights for rights of all friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0010
rows.name:
That mostly because government is lot like
business. If Kopopo only look after own
needs, no one trusts Kopopo anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0011
rows.name:
Kopopo shared this philosophy with
Sun'barac, who seemed very moved. That
sure sign Sun'barac is quality fellow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Kopopo about the election.

rows.label: tev055301_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Kopopo about recent developments.

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Mo-mo-meeeh! Kopopo not picked
as representative! No fair![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0013
rows.name:
All hard work of Kopopo sending
fluffy Nopon to convince bigwigs
now up in smoke! Pffft![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Wait. Kopopo gets it! Kopopo just
need to turn this into business![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Kopopo call it "Nopon-a-Day!"
Nopon come to houses of friends
to cook and clean for them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0016
rows.name:
And no big deal if cooking tastes terrible
and nothing ever really gets clean, because
Nopon so cute and easy to forgive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0017
rows.name:
Now Kopopo just needs to think of
list of optional services and
surcharges. Mo! This is gold mine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Kopopo briefly in hot water because
Nopon who helped with election
think they should get paid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0022
rows.name:
Thankfully, Sun'barac find way
to put them on provisional
government payroll as accountants.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0023
rows.name:
Nopon merchants all very good at
number-crunching. Also good at
penny-pinching. Perfect for public service![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Kopopo must face it—Sun'barac
is great politician. Many smart
choices already being made.[ST:wait ]
